personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Capacity Planning & AI-Driven Infrastructure Optimization
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Capacity and Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience delivering forecasting, capacity optimization, and KPI-driven planning for large-scale infrastructure. Built automated analytics pipelines that ingested telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, produced executive dashboards, and predicted bottlenecks 3-6 months ahead using Prophet and scikit-learn. Strong background in resource optimization, cross-functional planning, and process automation using Python, SQL, PySpark, and AWS.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated telemetry pipelines ingesting P95 metrics from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual workflows and improving data timeliness for planning decisions.
Built Prophet and scikit-learn forecasting models that predicted capacity bottlenecks 3-6 months ahead and improved provisioning accuracy.
Generated monthly capacity reports and seasonal risk analysis used by leadership to prioritize capacity requests and optimize resource allocation.
Integrated TrueSight, CA APM, and AppDynamics datasets into unified reporting views with executive dashboards.
Identified underutilized infrastructure patterns and drove right-sizing actions that reduced waste and improved efficiency.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led performance analytics on user experience data to identify bottlenecks and improve service responsiveness.
Built before/after performance reporting for stakeholder decision-making and prioritization.
Managed Dynatrace monitoring modernization during cloud migration initiatives.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (CA APM SME)
bullets: Led enterprise observability deployments and optimization programs across large financial environments.
Developed monitoring dashboards and extraction scripts enabling KPI tracking and operational planning.
Partnered with cross-functional teams to standardize monitoring and improve controllership outcomes.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: HorizonScale - AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Replaced manual forecasting with AI-driven modeling and dashboarding, reducing forecasting cycle time by 90%.

projects.name: Enterprise Capacity Optimization Analytics
